purpose: Bootstrap module for the image group; installs a comprehensive image editing toolset: imagemagick, ffmpeg, format optimizers (pngquant, optipng, gifsicle, webp, jpegoptim, libheif), AI background removal (rembg), AI upscaling/anime (realesrgan-ncnn-vulkan), and Pillow injected into ipython.
invariants: imagemagick and ffmpeg are always global (apt); Python imaging libraries for project code go in the project venv via uv
Pillow is only injected if ipython is already installed — skipped with a warning otherwise
Pillow injection is idempotent: skipped if 'import PIL' already succeeds in the ipython env
rembg is installed via pipx (not uv/pip) and checked with 'has rembg' — the [cli] extra confuses pipx list name comparison
realesrgan-ncnn-vulkan binary is downloaded from GitHub releases and linked into ~/tools/bin; model files are NOT bundled in v0.2.0 and must be obtained separately
All installs are idempotent: guarded by has/pkg_installed checks before doing work
gotchas: ImageMagick 7 ships 'magick'; older versions used 'convert' — image_record_manifest checks magick first then falls back to convert
rembg[cli] extra cannot be detected via pipx list --short (name comparison strips the extra); custom idempotency check uses 'has rembg' instead
realesrgan-ncnn-vulkan v0.2.0 release zip contains only the binary (no model .param/.bin files); models must be placed in ~/tools/realesrgan/realesrgan-ncnn-vulkan-v0.2.0-ubuntu/models/ manually
realesrgan binary extracts to a versioned subdirectory, so find uses -maxdepth 2 (not 1) to locate it
rembg downloads the u2net model (~170 MB) on first use, not at install time
The python group (ipython) must run before the image group for Pillow injection to succeed

key_functions.name: image_apt_extra
key_functions.summary: apt-installs format optimization tools: pngquant, optipng, gifsicle, webp, jpegoptim, libheif-examples

key_functions.name: image_rembg
key_functions.summary: pipx-installs rembg[cli] for AI background removal; idempotency check uses 'has rembg' because [cli] confuses pipx list

key_functions.name: image_realesrgan
key_functions.summary: Downloads realesrgan-ncnn-vulkan binary from GitHub releases, verifies SHA256, extracts to ~/tools/realesrgan/, and symlinks into ~/tools/bin

key_functions.name: image_pillow
key_functions.summary: Injects Pillow into the ipython pipx environment via 'pipx inject ipython Pillow' — skipped if ipython is absent or Pillow already importable

key_functions.name: image_record_manifest
key_functions.summary: Upserts manifest entries for all 10 image tools: imagemagick, ffmpeg, pillow, pngquant, optipng, gifsicle, webp, jpegoptim, libheif, rembg, realesrgan-ncnn-vulkan
